title: Red Hat Security Advisory: libxml2 security update
overview:
An update for libxml2 is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Moderate. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

full_text:
Red Hat Security Advisory: libxml2 security update

An update for libxml2 is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Moderate. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

An update for libxml2 is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Moderate. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

Updated Packages:
libxml2-2.9.13-14.el9_7.src.rpm
libxml2-2.9.13-14.el9_7.i686.rpm
libxml2-2.9.13-14.el9_7.x86_64.rpm

libxml2-devel-2.9.13-14.el9_7.x86_64.rpm

python3-libxml2-debuginfo-2.9.13-14.el9_7.s390x.rpm
libxml2-2.9.13-14.el9_7.ppc64le.rpm
libxml2-debuginfo-2.9.13-14.el9_7.ppc64le.rpm
libxml2-debugsource-2.9.13-14.el9_7.ppc64le.rpm
libxml2-devel-2.9.13-14.el9_7.ppc64le.rpm
python3-libxml2-2.9.13-14.el9_7.ppc64le.rpm
python3-libxml2-debuginfo-2.9.13-14.el9_7.ppc64le.rpm
libxml2-2.9.13-14.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
libxml2-debuginfo-2.9.13-14.el9_7.aarch64.rpm

CVE-2025-9714: A flaw was found in libxstl/libxml2. The 'exsltDynMapFunction' function in libexslt/dynamic.c does not contain a recursion depth check, which may cause an infinite loop via a specially crafted XSLT document while handling 'dyn:map()', leading to stack exhaustion and a local denial of service.
